emails.subject: RE: Amerex - Scott Halprian
emails.body: RE: Amerex Scott Halprian Andy, Coincidentally, I will be visiting London November 9th-11th and thought I might visit Enron's offices. I am unaware of Amerax's penetration into the UK energy markets, but they are among the top three in North America. As far as brokers go, Scott does a good job. He is straight forward and honest and consequently was getting the largest share of our business in the west. If you are interested, I would be happy to introduce you to Scott during my trip. My schedule is fairly flexible. Keith To: Holst, Keith; Allen, Phillip K.

emails.subject: RE: Amerex - Scott Halprian
emails.body: Sounds good. I'll plan on arriving to the office just after lunch and follow your lead on the beers. Keith To: Holst, Keith
